name: Batter-Fried Zucchini Sticks
recipeIngredient: 1 pound zucchini, cut into 3 or 4 inch sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the egg, milk, and oil.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until smooth.
4. Pat the zucchini sticks very dry with paper towels (optional: dredge lightly in additional flour).
5. Dip each piece into the batter one at a time.
6. Heat the oil for deep frying to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Fry the zucchini sticks in batches, turning occasionally, until golden brown, about 1-2 minutes.
8. Remove from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with additional salt if desired.
